findings.title: Remove committed AI conversation transcript
findings.impact: The new .conversations JSONL file publishes assistant reasoning and tool transcript details into the repository. Even when this instance does not contain usable credentials, these transcripts are not product source and can expose internal implementation notes, command history, environment assumptions, or future sensitive context to every downstream clone and package mirror.
findings.fix: Delete the .conversations/8c2f0b5d-3e4a-4b9c-8d2f-1b3c4d5e6f70.jsonl file from the PR and add or enforce an ignore/review rule so AI conversation transcripts are not committed. If any private environment data was present in related local transcripts, rotate or redact it before sharing.
